art_market.global_sales_outlook: Cautiously optimistic for 2026; market resilience driven by blue-chip demand and Asia-centric growth, despite geopolitical concerns and rising operational costs.
art_market.key_trends: Asia-centric buyer base pivot; Art Basel Hong Kong and Hong Kong Art Week events driving regional engagement; focus on digital/tech-driven art debuts.
art_market.recent_events: Hong Kong Art Week (March 23-29) in full swing; Art Basel Hong Kong (March 27-29) preview days approaching; widespread regional art events.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Fragile optimism; markets consolidating after sharp March 23 rebound (Dow +2.4%) as geopolitical tensions with Iran remain the central driver.
stock_market.key_factors: Ongoing US-Iran conflict causes extreme volatility; attention remains on potential escalation vs. de-escalation; investors hedging against downside risks amid oil market shifts.
